examples: Less maintenance busywork (and a happier staff).
You can keep doing the busywork. Or you can do more Great Work.
Flinging headlong into busywork itself is another way to seem indispensable.
Cloning extinct or endangered species should come as no surprise in the annals of anthropogenic busywork.
Once the busywork is done a human artisan can put the final touches on by hand.
